text: Living a healthy life involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking, swimming, or cycling, keeps your heart strong and your mind clear. Equally important is getting enough sleep, about seven to nine hours each night, which helps your body recover. However, good health also includes mental health. Managing stress through relaxation or hobbies is essential. Finally, a healthy work-life balance ensures you have time for yourself, family, and friends. When you combine these habits, you create a lifestyle that supports both body and mind.
